pilotRole: Adapt an approved tropical waterfall composition to the real board while establishing celestial-observatory identity.

identity.biome: Tropical waterfall sanctuary shaped by celestial crystal observatory craft

motifs: shielded lights opening toward the sky
restorationChange: Covered warning lights open outward; cold blue crystal light warms with restrained gold.

referenceAsset.role: composition reference for terraces, waterfall, paths, and landmark clearings; never a replacement for the live tile UI

landmarks.visual: Crystal nests beneath star cloth and warm lantern alcoves beside a small waterfall channel.
Rotating brass star rings and a compact blue-crystal observatory platform.
Fractured blue lenses arranged as a playful signal-testing terrace.
Moonstone shelves and sky maps protected by a low observatory dome.

boss.name: Noctyra
boss.visual: Black-crystal owl-dragon guardian with wing-shaped warning light, readable dark silhouette, violet crystal accents.

arena.name: Noctyra's Moon Gate
arena.visual: Wing-shaped observatory aperture focused on a crystalline signal dais.

avoid: dense props in the tile corridor
